do_not_merge.reason: Contradiction test (test 1): route_id differs ('Q52/Q53' vs 'Q52 SBS'). The proposed record bundles two bases; it cannot merge into a single base route record.

Contradiction test (test 1): route_id differs ('Q52 SBS' vs 'Q53-SBS') and base route id differs (Q52 vs Q53). Different routes with same SBS variant but distinct base identifiers.

weak_aliases.reason: The alias 'route_q52-sbs' could be misinterpreted as the Q52 SBS route, but the record represents a combined Q52/Q53 proposal.

suggestion.rationale: All three records have distinct route_id/base identifiers. The proposed record (Q52/Q53) bundles two distinct bases and cannot merge into either individual record. Q52 SBS and Q53 SBS are separate base routes with different route_ids and route_labels. No merge is possible under test 1 (contradiction) of the identity merge canon.
